SELECT event_time, toStartOfTenMinutes(event_time) AS rounded_time FROM test_time_intervals;
SELECT a.event_time, toStartOfTenMinutes(a.event_time) FROM test_time_intervals AS a WHERE a.event_time > toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:15:00');

SELECT a.event_time, b.user_id, toStartOfTenMinutes(a.event_time) AS rounded_time FROM test_time_intervals AS a JOIN (SELECT user_id, event_date FROM users_events) AS b ON a.event_time >= b.event_date;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS rounded_time_count, toStartOfTenMinutes(event_time) FROM test_time_intervals GROUP BY rounded_time;
